sourceTitle: ChatGPT: What ANU academics need to know
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Minor changes to a range of relevant governance documents and academic integrity guidance for students are also being considered. Once approved, these changes are likely to require students to acknowledge any use of artificial intelligence in their work.
